🗺️ Process Architecture & Field Connectivity
Complete data flow map — Eland PPC Production Planning & Control System
END-TO-END MODULE FLOW
FIELD-TO-FIELD CONNECTIVITY MAP
Source Module Source Field → Target Module(s) Target Field Link Type Validation
LIVE DATA STORE OVERVIEW
MODULE DESCRIPTIONS & RESPONSIBILITIES
👥 Buyer Master
Stores buyer/brand information (name, country, certification). Primary key: buyers[].name. Referenced by Style Master for buyer selection and cascade rename.
👔 Style Master
Central style record with SMV, colorways, OB No., delivery date, fabric in-house date. Primary key: styles[].id. Root anchor for all planning data.
⚙️ OPB (Operation Sequence)
Defines operations and time values per style. Stored as opbData[styleId]. Feeds into layout and efficiency calculations.
📐 Layout Plan
Assigns operations to workstations per style. Stored as layoutData[styleId]. Links OPB operations to physical line positions.
📅 Batch Plan (Gantt)
Allocates styles to batches across a date calendar. Records stored in opAllocs[] with styleId, batch, unit, dates, qty. Generates daily targets.
📊 Factory Line Plan (FLP)
Daily planned vs actual tracking per line. References allocations to generate targets. Stored in flpEntries[].
🏭 Production Modules
Cutting, Sewing, Finishing, Shipment. Records actual daily output by style/batch/date. Feeds real-time KPIs and efficiency calculations.
📷 OCR Module
Scans fabric/trim documents via camera. Extracted data (roll no., width, received qty) is matched to styles by roll number and stored for consumption tracking.
DATA VALIDATION RULES
Rule Where Enforced Type Action on Violation
Buyer must exist before Style saveStyle() FK CHECK Blocks save — shows toast with buyer name
Style must have SMV before allocation opActivateAlloc() REQUIRED Blocks allocation — shows SMV required message
Batch must have a unit saveBatchConfig() REQUIRED Blocks save — row-level error toast
Batch unit must exist in Factory Config saveBatchConfig() FK CHECK Warning toast — unit reference validated
Fabric in-house gate for allocation start opActivateAlloc() DATE GATE Warning + days shortfall shown — user can override
Delete style with downstream usage deleteStyle() CASCADE Detailed count by module shown — confirm required
Delete buyer with linked styles buyerDeleteRow() CASCADE Count shown — orphan warning if styles exist
Buyer/Batch/Unit rename cascade buyerSaveEdit() saveBatchConfig() AUTO CASCADE All linked records renamed automatically — count shown

🗺️ Process Architecture & Field Connectivity
Complete data flow map — Eland PPC Production Planning & Control System
END-TO-END MODULE FLOW
FIELD-TO-FIELD CONNECTIVITY MAP
Source Module Source Field → Target Module(s) Target Field Link Type Validation
LIVE DATA STORE OVERVIEW
MODULE DESCRIPTIONS & RESPONSIBILITIES
👥 Buyer Master
Stores buyer/brand information (name, country, certification). Primary key: buyers[].name. Referenced by Style Master for buyer selection and cascade rename.
👔 Style Master
Central style record with SMV, colorways, OB No., delivery date, fabric in-house date. Primary key: styles[].id. Root anchor for all planning data.
⚙️ OPB (Operation Sequence)
Defines operations and time values per style. Stored as opbData[styleId]. Feeds into layout and efficiency calculations.
📐 Layout Plan
Assigns operations to workstations per style. Stored as layoutData[styleId]. Links OPB operations to physical line positions.
📅 Batch Plan (Gantt)
Allocates styles to batches across a date calendar. Records stored in opAllocs[] with styleId, batch, unit, dates, qty. Generates daily targets.
📊 Factory Line Plan (FLP)
Daily planned vs actual tracking per line. References allocations to generate targets. Stored in flpEntries[].
🏭 Production Modules
Cutting, Sewing, Finishing, Shipment. Records actual daily output by style/batch/date. Feeds real-time KPIs and efficiency calculations.
📷 OCR Module
Scans fabric/trim documents via camera. Extracted data (roll no., width, received qty) is matched to styles by roll number and stored for consumption tracking.
DATA VALIDATION RULES
Rule Where Enforced Type Action on Violation
Buyer must exist before Style saveStyle() FK CHECK Blocks save — shows toast with buyer name
Style must have SMV before allocation opActivateAlloc() REQUIRED Blocks allocation — shows SMV required message
Batch must have a unit saveBatchConfig() REQUIRED Blocks save — row-level error toast
Batch unit must exist in Factory Config saveBatchConfig() FK CHECK Warning toast — unit reference validated
Fabric in-house gate for allocation start opActivateAlloc() DATE GATE Warning + days shortfall shown — user can override
Delete style with downstream usage deleteStyle() CASCADE Detailed count by module shown — confirm required
Delete buyer with linked styles buyerDeleteRow() CASCADE Count shown — orphan warning if styles exist
Buyer/Batch/Unit rename cascade buyerSaveEdit() saveBatchConfig() AUTO CASCADE All linked records renamed automatically — count shown
